content.text:
<user_query>
Thoroughness: very thorough. Explore this repo to identify where the calibration user flow/state machine is implemented, including route transitions and step names related to scan, identity verification, wow cards, narrative, roadmap, report generation, chief marketing summary, agent chat, integration connect, executive snapshot/reveal, market, tutorial. Return: (1) key files with one-line purpose, (2) current ordered flow as implemented, (3) where to insert new states abn_validation and social_enrichment, (4) any constraints that indicate backend logic boundaries.
</user_query>
Searching the repository for calibration flow, routes, and step-related code.

Here is a concise map of how calibration is implemented in this worktree.

---

## 1) Key files (absolute paths, one-line purpose)

**Orchestration / state machine**

- `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\yrb\frontend\src\hooks\useCalibrationState.js` — Owns the calibration `entry` string, scan → identity → CMO → agent chat → integration → snapshot → complete, API/edge calls, `autoSave` steps, and redirect to `/market` when backend reports `COMPLETE` on init.
- `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\yrb\frontend\src\pages\CalibrationAdvisor.js` — Renders the screen for each `entry`, wires tutorials, OAuth return `?step=integration_connect`, and admin skip.

**Steps / UI**

- `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\yrb\frontend\src\components\calibration\CalibrationComponents.js` — Loading, welcome/domain scan (`WelcomeHandshake`), manual summary fallback, audit progress copy/phases.
- `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\yrb\frontend\src\components\calibration\ForensicIdentityCard.js` — Identity verification UI and `data-testid="forensic-identity-card"`.
- `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\yrb\frontend\src\components\calibration\ChiefMarketingSummary.js` — Chief Marketing / footprint report (`data-testid="chief-marketing-summary"`).
- `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\yrb\frontend\src\components\calibration\WowSummary.js` — Legacy “wow” card-style summary + `DissolveTransition` (transition animation still used from `CalibrationAdvisor.js`).
- `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\yrb\frontend\src\components\calibration\AgentCalibrationChat.js` — 9-step operator “agent calibration” chat (multiple choice) calling `calibration-psych`.
- `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\yrb\frontend\src\components\calibration\PostCMOIntegrationOverlay.js` — Post-CMO email integration connect + OAuth return URL to `/calibration?step=integration_connect`.
- `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\yrb\frontend\src\components\calibration\IntelligencePhases.js` — `ExecutiveCMOSnapshot` (“Here’s what BIQc sees”) and optional `ForensicCalibrationUI` promo/skip.
- `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\yrb\frontend\src\components\calibration\ExecutiveReveal.js` — “Executive reveal” phased copy during `completing` (`REVEAL_PHASES`).
- `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\yrb\frontend\src\components\calibration\CalibratingSession.js` — Older wizard/chat session driven by `calibration-psych` (still in hook but not on the main path below).
- `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\yrb\frontend\src\components\calibration\ContinuitySuite.js` — Resume/progress UI (`data-testid="continuity-suite"`); nothing in `useCalibrationState` sets `entry === "continuity"`.
- `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\yrb\frontend\src\components\CognitiveLoadingScreen.js` — `CognitiveIgnitionScreen` for `ignition`.
- `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\yrb\frontend\src\components\TutorialOverlay.js` — `CalibrationTutorial` keys: `calibration-welcome`, `calibration-chat`, `calibration-wow` (wired from `CalibrationAdvisor.js`).

**Routing / guards**

- `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\yrb\frontend\src\App.js` — `/calibration` → `ProtectedRoute` + `CalibrationAdvisor`; `/calibration-qa`, `/calibration-preview`, `/market/calibration` (separate forensic flow).
- `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\yrb\frontend\src\components\ProtectedRoute.js` — `NEEDS_CALIBRATION` forces `/calibration` (with allowlist); special handling so `/calibration` still renders during auth `LOADING`.
- `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\yrb\frontend\src\pages\LoginSupabase.js` — Post-login: `NEEDS_CALIBRATION` → `/calibration`, else `/advisor`.
- `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\yrb\frontend\src\context\SupabaseAuthContext.js` — Bootstraps auth; uses `/api/calibration/status` for calibration gate (referenced in repo).

**Backend**

- `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\yrb\backend\routes\calibration.py` — `/calibration/status`, skip/defer/reset, `/console/state`, `/enrichment/website` (scan path: scrape + Serper + LLM synthesis), lifecycle helpers.
- `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\yrb\backend\server.py` — Mounts calibration router on the main API.

**Edge / related**

- `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\yrb\supabase\functions\calibration-psych\index.ts` (and hyphen variant) — Psych profiling for legacy `CalibratingSession` / `callEdge`.
- Scan path uses `callEdgeFunction('scrape-business-profile')`, `callEdgeFunction('calibration-business-dna')`, `callEdgeFunction('business-identity-lookup')`, `callEdgeFunction('biqc-insights-cognitive')`, `callEdgeFunction('calibration-sync')` from `useCalibrationState.js`.

**Product docs (not runtime)**

- `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\yrb\docs\CALIBRATION_2_PRODUCT_SPEC_V1.md`, `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\yrb\docs\CALIBRATION_2_REGRESSION_TEST_MATRIX.md` — Spec language for `wow_cards`, events, etc.

**Separate “market / forensic / reports” (not the same state machine)**

- `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\yrb\frontend\src\pages\ForensicCalibration.js` — `/market/calibration` questionnaire + `/api/forensic/calibration`.
- `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\yrb\frontend\src\pages\MarketPage.js` — Post-calibration market intelligence UI; links to `/market/calibration`.
- `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\yrb\frontend\src\pages\ReportsPage.js` — PDF reports (`/reports/generate-pdf`), not part of `entry` flow.

---

## 2) Current ordered flow (as implemented)

**Route:** user lands on **`/calibration`** (unless `GET /api/calibration/status` returns `COMPLETE`, then immediate **`navigate('/market', { replace: true })`** in `detectState`).

**`entry` sequence (happy path):**

1. **`loading`** — Initial; then `detectState()`.
2. **`ignition`** — `CognitiveIgnitionScreen` → `setEntry("welcome")`.
3. **`welcome`** — Domain + scan submit (`WelcomeHandshake`, `initialPhase="scan"`).
4. **`manual_summary`** — Optional if user chooses manual fallback from welcome.
5. **`analyzing`** — During scan (`AuditProgress`).
6. **`identity_verification`** — `ForensicIdentityCard` when `identitySignals` exist; if missing, welcome/scan UI is shown again with an error.
7. **`wow_summary`** — `ChiefMarketingSummary` only if `identityConfirmed` and not `transitioning` (otherwise manual summary fallback can loop back to `wow_summary`).
8. **`transitioning`** — `DissolveTransition` while CMO confirm runs.
9. **`agent_calibration`** — `AgentCalibrationChat` (9-step MC, `calibration-psych`); entered after `handleConfirmWow` saves profile and calls `fetchIntelligence()`.
10. **`integration_connect`** — `PostCMOIntegrationOverlay`; OAuth return uses **`/calibration?step=integration_connect`** (handled in `CalibrationAdvisor.js`).
11. **`intelligence-first`** — `ExecutiveCMOSnapshot` (“Executive Intelligence Snapshot” / “Here’s what BIQc sees”); Continue → `proceedFromIntelligence`.
12. **`completing`** — `ExecutiveReveal` with phased `REVEAL_PHASES`; timer then **`navigate('/market', { replace: true })`**.

**`autoSave` numeric steps** (orthogonal to `entry`, persisted via `POST /console/state`): e.g. `1` after scan, `2` after identity confirm, `3` after CMO confirm, `4` after agent calibration complete, `9` + `COMPLETE` when finishing from intelligence snapshot.

**Tutorials:** `welcome` → `calibration-welcome`; `calibrating` → `calibration-chat`; `wow_summary` → `calibration-wow` (the main line today rarely hits `calibrating`; see below).

**Legacy / unreachable branches in this hook**

- **`calibrating`** — Only entered via `applyResponse` after `handleWizardContinue` / `handleChatSubmit`; nothing on the main path sets `entry` to `calibrating` anymore (agent chat replaced that funnel).
- **`forensic`** and **`continuity`** — Rendered in `CalibrationAdvisor.js` but **`useCalibrationState` never `setEntry`s them**, so they are dead unless something external called `setEntry` (it does not today).

**“Wow cards” in production path:** The live CMO step is **`ChiefMarketingSummary`** with `wowSummary` state; the **`WowSummary`** component is used in **`CalibrationPreview.js`**, not in the main `CalibrationAdvisor` tree.

**“Roadmap”:** No dedicated `entry` named roadmap; closest product copy is elsewhere (e.g. `MoreFeaturesPage.js` “Launch roadmap”), not this state machine.

**“Report generation”:** Not a calibration `entry`; lives under **`/reports`** and related APIs.

---

## 3) Where to insert `abn_validation` and `social_enrichment`

Both should be modeled as new **`entry` values** in `useCalibrationState.js`, with matching branches in `CalibrationAdvisor.js` (and optionally tutorial keys if you want overlays).

**`abn_validation`**

- **Best seam:** Immediately **after** successful scan enrichment (you already merge ABN from edge + `POST /calibration/enrichment/website` + `parseIdentitySignals`) and **before** `setEntry("identity_verification")` (see the block ending around `setEntry("identity_verification")` after `autoSave(1)` in `handleAuditSubmit`).
- **Alternative:** **After** `handleConfirmIdentity` and **before** `setEntry("wow_summary")` if you want ABN verified only once the user has reviewed the card.
- **Existing hook:** `handleAbnLookup` → `business-identity-identity-lookup` edge is already used from **`ForensicIdentityCard`**; a dedicated step can reuse or replace inline lookup.

**`social_enrichment`**

- **Best seam:** After **`identity_verification`** (user confirmed who they are) and **before** **`wow_summary`**, so social graph / handles feed the CMO bundle cleanly; today `handleConfirmIdentity` jumps straight to `wow_summary`.
- **Alternative:** Immediately **after** deep merge in `handleAuditSubmit` (where `social_media_links` / `social_handles` / analyses are applied) if enrichment must complete before showing identity UI at all.

Also update **`CalibrationAdvisor.js`** `useEffect` for **`?step=`** if either step should be **resumable from URL** (same pattern as `integration_connect`).

---

## 4) Backend / logic boundaries

- **Completion gate:** **`GET /api/calibration/status`** is authoritative: **`strategic_console_state.is_complete`** first, then **`user_operator_profile.persona_calibration_status`**. That drives redirect-to-`/market` on calibration load and auth bootstrap—not the React `entry` string.
- **Persisted progress:** **`POST /api/console/state`** stores `current_step` + `status` in `operator_profile.console_state`; **`COMPLETE`** also writes **`persona_calibration_status: complete`** and upserts **`strategic_console_state`** (see `calibration.py` `save_console_state`). The frontend also **direct-upserts** those tables on `COMPLETE` in `autoSave` (belt-and-suspenders).
- **Scan + identity data:** **Edge** `calibration-business-dna` + optional **`POST /api/calibration/enrichment/website`** (Python: scrape, Serper, LLM JSON). Failures in enrichment are **non-fatal**; scan can still proceed with edge-only data.
- **Business profile:** **`PUT /api/business-profile`** clears/patches fields at scan start and saves identity + CMO payload; boundary for “what the rest of the app reads.”
- **Psych / agent chat:** **`calibration-psych`** via `callEdge` during legacy `calibrating`; **`AgentCalibrationChat`** uses the same edge—**no Python state machine** for question text beyond what the edge returns.
- **Intelligence snapshot:** **`biqc-insights-cognitive`** prefetched in `handleConfirmWow` / `triggerComplete`; executive snapshot UI is **frontend-only** consumption of that payload.
- **Skip calibration:** **`POST /api/calibration/skip`** is **super-admin (or master email) only** per `calibration.py`.

That split means: **new steps are mostly frontend `entry` + optional new APIs**; **anything that must survive refresh or gate login** should align with **`/calibration/status`**, **`/console/state`**, and **`strategic_console_state` / `user_operator_profile`**, and with **when** you call **`autoSave`** so step numbers stay coherent.
